title: Coding with AI
content: AI tools are rapidly changing how indie developers build apps and games. Tasks that once took hours — or even days — can now often be completed much faster using AI-assisted workflows.
At Barkin Mad Studios, AI is used as a development assistant to help accelerate coding, debugging, UI ideas, localization, and rapid prototyping across multiple projects.
Projects such as ZXSnake, ZXBrick, and ZXSpace have all benefited from AI-assisted workflows, allowing more time to focus on gameplay, polish, testing, and creativity.
AI does not replace developers. Architecture decisions, optimisation, game design, and final implementation still require human creativity and experience.
For indie developers, AI has become a powerful tool that helps turn ideas into working products faster than ever before.
